SELECT code, chr(code) FROM ascii_values WHERE code BETWEEN 0 AND 127;
SELECT chr(code) FROM (SELECT code from ascii_values WHERE code < 100) AS temp;
SELECT a.code, chr(a.code) AS character FROM ascii_values a JOIN ascii_values b ON a.code = b.code WHERE a.code < 128;
WITH char_codes AS (SELECT chr(code) AS character FROM ascii_values) SELECT character, LENGTH(character) FROM char_codes;
SELECT chr(code + 1) AS next_char FROM ascii_values WHERE code < 255;
SELECT a.code, chr(a.code) FROM ascii_values a LEFT JOIN ascii_values b ON a.code = b.code + 5 WHERE b.code IS NULL;
SELECT code, chr(code) FROM unicode_values WHERE code >= 0 AND code <= 1114111;
SELECT a.code, chr(a.code) FROM unicode_values a JOIN unicode_values b ON a.code = b.code WHERE a.code > 128000 AND a.code < 129000;
WITH chars AS (SELECT chr(code) AS character FROM unicode_values) SELECT character FROM chars WHERE character IS NOT NULL;
